allowlist.command: ^(ls|find|git|npm run typecheck|npm run lint|npm run test)

hints.context-awareness: Always read CLAUDE.md first for conventions and paths before exploring.
hints.token-efficiency: Use /compact frequently. Point Claude to exact file:line numbers. Switch to Haiku for linting/formatting.
hints.arch-notes: Feature modules in src/features/ own their domain. Server components by default. Use getOrgRequestContext() for org/user/perms.
